title: Chillin with the homies
description: A vanilla+ modpack designed to be relaxing to play with your friends (hence the name). Features performance improving, game enhancing and quality of life improving mods.
body:
# Description
A vanilla+ modpack designed to be relaxing to play with your friends (hence the name). Features performance improving, game enhancing and quality of life improving mods.

## Licensing
- [Astraliyte's Animated Textures](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/astraliyte-s-animated-textures/)
- [Structory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structory)
- [Super Better Grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
